chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-368 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Learned counsel submits that the petitioner intends first to challenge the Police Constable Recruitment Policy, 2022 and thereafter file a fresh petition agitating the same grievance as raised in the present petition. Accordingly, he does not wish to press the present petition. The learned Additional Advocate General has also not objected to this course. In view of the above, the present Constitution Petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
